title: <div>  •  The Lone Wanderer’s Gamble → Can counter fate once per semester, but t
content:
• The Lone Wanderer’s Gamble → Can counter fate once per semester, but the result is entirely random.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Gives each group a mechanically unique purpose, preventing generic counters.
✔ Makes fate countering more dynamic—players must think carefully about who intervenes.
✔ Ensures that solo players are not simply excluded from faction-based play.

📜 2. Hard Cap on Archetype Purges – Max Five for the Semester

📜 Each class session may feature a purge opportunity, but the total number is limited to five.

✔ How Purge Limits Work:
• Only five purges can happen in total, semester-wide.
• If a purge opportunity arises but the limit has been reached, it is lost permanently.
• If multiple people want to purge at the same time, they must compete for the slot.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 543 (chunk 543/555)
